# main inputs

## model
from results_sim75/sim10/weights/w73700.pt		#path to the .pt file containing the starting weights (if None, gaussian initialization of the weights)       results_sim75/sim10/weights/w73700.pt
d 64				#embedding size
H 1				#number of heads 
m 256				#number of neurons of FFNN
L 3				#number of encoder block
n 86				#length of sequence

## train
batch_size_train 64
warmup_steps 4e3
betas (0.9, 0.98)  
eps 1e-9
validation_rate 0.1
n_data 5000


## cost function
cost CE				#cost function employed for the sampling
zeta 0.5			#additive parameters for the cost function

## metric function
metric accuracy_CE			#metric function employed during the sampling

## generator
generator_seed 7		#torch generator seed


## sampler
stime_list  [1.0e+3]     	#list of simulated times (moves=stime/(dt*isteps))
T_list      [1.5e-3]     	#list of sampled temperatures
dt_list     [7.5e-4]       	#list of single-integration time-steps
isteps_list [10]		#list of number of integration steps per move
m_list      [1.0]		#list of weights masses
lamda       1e-6		#regularization term coefficient
lob         0			#boolean variable, whether to substitute or not lambda->lambda/beta 
start       0
batch_size_grad 256    		#batch size to compute grad and calculate integral
batch_size 64			# batch size to compute U
